title: Debug assertion sqlite3Fts5HashScanNext: Assertion `!sqlite3Fts5HashScanEof(p)' failed
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt0 USING fts5(c0, prefix = 71, tokenize = "porter ascii", prefix = 9);
key_bug_features: Integrity check triggers assertion error in FTS5
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt1 USING fts5(c1, c2, tokenize = 'porter ascii');
INSERT INTO vt1(c1, c2) VALUES ('test', NULL);
SELECT * FROM vt1 WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL;
